built_recently: Launched a live Kalshi trading bot — real money, fully automated. The bot runs every hour via GitHub Actions, sizes trades dynamically (10% of balance, compounding as the account grows), and targets markets resolving within 7 days only. No year-long lockups. Duration is now the primary ranking signal: a 70% market closing tonight beats an 85% market closing next month. Starting balance: $89.62.
coming_next: Watching the first live trades resolve and tuning the short-duration market pipeline. The near-term Kalshi fetch (markets closing within 72 hours) just went live — expect same-day and next-day trades to start appearing as the pipeline warms up. The Spread arbitrage signal is next once tickers are populating correctly.
